caption: The video features a close-up of Bola Tinubu, a prominent Nigerian political figure, speaking to the media. He is wearing a black cap with white embroidery and round glasses, and his expression appears serious as he addresses the camera. The background shows several people, some holding cameras, indicating that this is likely a press event or public statement. The text overlay on the screen reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME - BOLA TINUBU," suggesting that he is making a significant announcement or declaration regarding his role in Nigerian politics. The setting seems to be outdoors, possibly during a campaign rally or a similar public gathering. The overall tone of the video conveys a sense of urgency and importance in Tinubu's message.
